analysis_plan_ref.anchor: section 2.3 (alignment mathematics, max-stat family, admission criteria) + section 6 record freeze-shape note (ASM-1705) + section 8 G0 routing

arms_mandatory_baselines: permutation-null (B=1000 seeded global concept-to-vector permutations, seed 1, full pipeline re-run per replicate — the joint max-stat family, ASM-1701)
bag-of-primes structure-destroyed kernel null (roles/clause-order/depth deleted; admission criterion 4, ASM-1702)

dependent_vars.definition: Number of layers in which the FORK-1-winning method admits >= 1 STRUCTURAL direction under all four §2.3 admission criteria (criterion 1 = joint max-stat p <= 0.05 across directions x layers x methods; lexical-only admissions never count) — /analysis/n_layers_admitted.
dependent_vars.name: n_layers_admitted

dependent_vars.definition: t* = the ceil(0.95(B+1))-th order statistic of the B=1000 permutation maxima T_b — the shared admission threshold and the basis-assembly ordering origin (§2.3).
dependent_vars.name: max_stat_threshold

dependent_vars.definition: (1/r)||P_ker P_C4||_F^2 between the top-r kernel-corpus and C4-corpus uncentred activation subspaces per layer; >= 0.9 at ALL layers raises the expected-tie flag (§8, ASM-1662 resolution).
dependent_vars.name: c4_subspace_overlap

dependent_vars.definition: Top-PC variance fraction of the probe-set representation per pooling variant — the FORK-2 decider; > 0.5 for both poolings = template-dominated (§10 FORK-2 kill).
dependent_vars.name: template_variance_top_pc

dependent_vars.definition: Structural admissions per layer for the winning method, per-layer cap k <= min(d/2, 256) (ASM-1702); the basis-eligible set for the ddc1 A2 arm.
dependent_vars.name: admitted_directions_per_layer

endpoints.test: Count of layers with >= 1 STRUCTURAL admission for the FORK-1-winning method; admission per direction requires ALL FOUR §2.3 criteria: (1) TEST-partition score significant under the single Westfall-Young max-stat permutation family across directions x layers x method-selection, p = (1+#{T_b >= s})/(B+1) <= 0.05, B=1000, seed 1, FULL pipeline re-run per replicate (ASM-1701); (2) carrier-half stability |cos| >= 0.8; (3) minimal-contrast survival, per-stratum permutation p <= 0.05, positive sign; (4) bag-of-primes 90% bootstrap CI of s - s_bag excludes 0 (else lexical-only, flagged, never counted). Pre-registered primary claim: n_layers_admitted >= ceil(L/3) = 10 (/analysis/n_layers_admitted_ge_third). No SESOI: this record carries no NULL verdict row (ASM-1705) — the gate either licenses A2 or kills it.

Expected-tie flag (§8, resolves ASM-1662): kernel/C4 subspace overlap >= 0.9 at working r for ALL 30 layers. True surfaces MD-2 (kernel-of-truth-vzk5); the ddc1 campaign still runs either way — diagnostic only, no verdict weight.

FORK-1 mechanical resolution: the method with structural admissions in more layers wins; tie -> ridge-cca (pre-declared v1 default). Recorded for the ddc1 A2 basis construction; per-method counts at /analysis/n_layers_admitted_ridge_cca and /analysis/n_layers_admitted_procrustes.

FORK-2 mechanical resolution via the template-variance diagnostic (/analysis/template_variance_top_pc): mean-pool iff its top-PC variance fraction <= 0.5; else last-token iff <= 0.5; else template-dominated (reported as such, §10).

t* = ceil(0.95(B+1))-th order statistic of the permutation maxima — reported for the §2.3 basis-assembly ordering (null-beating strength = s - t*); admitted candidates listed at /analysis/max_stat_p_admitted with carrier-half and minimal-contrast summaries at /analysis/carrier_half_stability and /analysis/minimal_contrast_survival; lexical-only admissions flagged at /analysis/bag_of_primes_lexical_flags; per-layer C4 overlap at /analysis/c4_subspace_overlap_per_layer and admitted-direction counts at /analysis/admitted_directions_per_layer.

extrapolation_envelope_verbatim: Results bind only to: the SmolLM2-135M base checkpoint at the pinned revision (d=576, L=30 residual block boundaries); the pinned carrier-controlled probe construction, FIT/SEL/TEST concept splits (seed 0), and the quasi-orthogonal kot-enc-Bq/1 native codebook at D=576; ridge-CCA and orthogonal Procrustes alignment under the §2.3 joint max-stat permutation family (B=1000, seed 1) with all four admission criteria. A pass licenses only the running of the A2 surgical arm of ddc1 — it is a gate statistic, never itself a kernel-geometry capability claim. Nothing here extends to other donors, scales, native dimensions, kernel states, alignment constructions, or behavioural claims of any kind.
hypotheses: H1 (gate hypothesis, resolves ASM-1706): kernel geometry is transportable into model space by ridge-CCA/Procrustes at n~119 pairs, d=576 — operationalised as: the FORK-1-winning method admits >= 1 direction (all four §2.3 criteria, criterion 1 under the joint max-stat family at alpha=0.05) in at least ceil(L/3) = 10 of the 30 layers (/analysis/n_layers_admitted >= 10).
H0: admitted directions in fewer than ceil(L/3) layers for BOTH methods — A2 is killed-by-G0 before any surgery is paid for; ddc1 runs without its geometry arm.
Diagnostic (resolves ASM-1662, no verdict weight): the kernel/C4 subspace overlap (1/r)||P_ker P_C4||_F^2 >= 0.9 at working r for ALL layers raises the §8 expected-tie flag and surfaces MD-2.
kill_criterion_verbatim: If neither ridge-CCA nor Procrustes yields admitted directions (all four §2.3 admission criteria, criterion 1 under the joint max-stat threshold across directions × layers × methods) in at least ⌈L/3⌉ layers, A2 is dropped and reported as killed-by-G0. A kill is reported at the same prominence as a pass.

corpus_hashes._recipe: kot-corpus-hash/1: digest = sha256 over the UTF-8 concatenation of one line per regular file under data/<corpus>/ (recursive; symlinks and directories excluded), each line '<sha256-of-file-bytes-hex>  <relpath>\n' with exactly two spaces, relpath POSIX-style ('/'-separated) relative to data/<corpus>/, lines sorted by the UTF-8 byte order of relpath; reference implementation tools/registry/corpus-pin.py

pins.harness_manifest: poc/ddc G0 statistics harness (g0_runner.py probe+stats stages, g0_stats.py section-2.3 mathematics — ridge-CCA/Procrustes fits, joint max-stat permutation family, admission-criteria raw statistics, C4 overlap, template-variance diagnostic — plus modal/modal_ddc.py wrapper): staged-bytes manifest sha256=c03ae3ea7dba042ecaeb03421fb737d6f41abd76ca88ae33c30b35e20b57d6a1 (canonical JSON; poc/ddc/modal/modal_ddc.py --print-manifest), green mock at $0 pinned as poc/ddc/results/mock-validation.json (ddc0 verdict mapping resolves on the planted mock gradient; g0_stats planted-alignment self-test green). T0 ops 2026-07-12: probe fixture + corpora built and staged (builders poc/ddc/t0/), staged sha re-pinned; mock re-validated green against the staged bytes. The pinned analysis script below consumes its candidates/null/sidecar outputs and recomputes every gate and admission from raw fields, never trusting precomputed verdicts

anchors: section 6 (G0 stage row + record freeze-shape note)

title: DDC Stage-0 statistics (G0): are max-stat-admitted kernel-aligned directions present in enough layers of SmolLM2-135M to license the A2 kernel-geometry arm of ddc1? Ridge-CCA and orthogonal Procrustes vs the native kot-enc-Bq/1 D=576 codebook under one Westfall-Young max-stat permutation family across directions x layers x method-selection, with the four admission criteria of DDC.md §2.3 (carrier-half stability, minimal-contrast survival, bag-of-primes structural superiority) and the C4 expected-tie + template-variance diagnostics. Design: docs/next/design/DDC.md §§2.3, 6, 8 (ASM-1700, ASM-1701, ASM-1702, ASM-1705; gate premise ASM-1706, an open EXTRAPOLATION resolved by this very stage; C4-overlap premise ASM-1662 likewise).
